props.name: draftData
props.type: { id: string; label: string; dateString: string; notes?: string | undefined; }

props.name: activeNode
props.type: BuilderNode | { id: string; kind: "day"; parentId: null; data: { id: string; label: string; dateString: string; kind: "day"; }; }

props.name: sectionTabs
props.type: { id: "info" | "channel" | "specs" | "subtasks"; label: string; title: string; isPassed: boolean; }[] | undefined

props.name: importFlow
props.type: { importedNodes: BuilderNode[] | null; diff: ImportDiffGroup | null; applyImport: () => void; loadFromFile: (file: File) => Promise<void>; clear: () => void; confirmDeletes: boolean; setConfirmDeletes: (v: boolean) => void; decisions: Record<string, ImportDecision>; setDecision: (id: string, decision: ImportDecision) => void; }

props.name: formattedDateParts
props.type: { dayName: string; monthName: string; dateNum: number; full: string; } | null

props.name: onCellDrop
props.type: (e: React.DragEvent<Element>, targetActionId: string, dayIndex: number, isEnabled: boolean) => void

props.name: onSaveMinimalTask
props.type: (name: string, actionId: string, dayIndex: number) => void

props.name: onTaskClick
props.type: ((taskId: string, e: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>) => void) | undefined

props.name: onChange
props.type: (compositionId: string | null, subtasks?: Subtask[] | undefined) => void

props.name: onCompositionChange
props.type: (compositionId: string | null, subtasks?: Subtask[] | undefined) => void

props.name: setActiveProperty
props.type: (prop: { key: PropertyKey; val: string; } | null) => void
